MountTargetId.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 22  
Maximum Length: 45  
Pattern: ^fsmt-[0-9a-f]{17,40}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Ipv4Address.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 7  
Maximum Length: 15  
Pattern: ^[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}$  
Update requires: Replacement

Ipv6Address.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 3  
Maximum Length: 39  
Update requires: Replacement

IpAddressType.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: IPV4_ONLY | IPV6_ONLY | DUAL_STACK  
Update requires: Replacement

FileSystemId.markdownDescription:
---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 128  
Pattern: ^(arn:aws[-a-z]*:s3files:[0-9a-z-:]+:file-system/fs-[0-9a-f]{17,40}|fs-[0-9a-f]{17,40})$  
Update requires: Replacement

items.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 11  
Maximum Length: 43  
Pattern: ^(sg-[0-9a-f]{8,40})$  
Update requires: No interruption

SubnetId.markdownDescription:

Required: Yes
